prompt: Two premium business cards arranged on a dark marble surface with gold veining. The front card displays ultra-minimal branding: large letters L and K in a thin elegant sans-serif typeface like Futura Light with delicate slim strokes in charcoal, with a tiny gold foil square dot between them. Below in very small widely-spaced thin text, DESIGN AND BUILD. The name Lyda appears in the same thin typeface, with phone number 0401 061 246, email and Adelaide address details in micro text. Maximum white space on the card. The back card beside it shows just the thin L and K with gold foil square dot centered on a charcoal (#2C2C2C) background. Both cards are 600gsm cotton stock with soft matte texture, thick luxurious edges visible. The tiny gold foil square catches the light. Sophisticated product photography, shallow depth of field.
negative_prompt: cheap paper, thin cards, glossy plastic, blurry text, cluttered design, bright colors, neon, pile of cards, messy arrangement, low quality, cartoon, bold heavy text, ornate, busy layout

settings.lighting: soft studio lighting with subtle reflections on foil
